feat.name: Inhale, Exhale!
feat.text: You take an especially deep breath as a prelude to unleashing your dragonet breath on your foes. If your next action is to use your Dragonet Breath, add 5 feet to the length of the cone or line. If your breath deals damage, you also deal one additional die of damage.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Dragonet
traits.text: Dragonets are miniature dragons, complete with wings, dagger-like teeth, and magical breath. They can be fiercely independent and proud, at times protective or avaricious, and they delight in the finer things in life.
